acceptance_targets: [chapter_12_prose_001] FAIL if all four cited passages still end by translating the scene into a generalized conclusion. PASS only if at least two of the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:57, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:227, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:353, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:469 land on concrete image/sensation/social detail while preserving the same narrative meaning.

[chapter_12_prose_002] PASS only if, across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:79, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:393, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:405, no more than one passage still uses repeated-stem anaphora as its dominant rhythm, and across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:277 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:311 the paired-negation construction appears at most once. FAIL if two or more of those cited passages still rely on the same buildup shape.

[FBR-007] Pass if the cited span contains no "almost said" construction and Micah's refusal reads in a distinctly teen voice. Fail if two withheld-speech beats still stack in sequence or if the replacement turns into generic explanation.

findings.acceptance_test: FAIL if all four cited passages still end by translating the scene into a generalized conclusion. PASS only if at least two of the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:57, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:227, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:353, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:469 land on concrete image/sensation/social detail while preserving the same narrative meaning.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly lands strong concrete beats with an extra explanatory coda that states the meaning after the scene has already made it legible. In Micah's close-third this starts to read as authorial summary rather than his faster, image-driven interior register, flattening several otherwise sharp paragraph endings.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the paragraph landings at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:57, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:227, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:353, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:469. Keep the pressure and consequence, but let at least two of these beats end on image, body, or socially specific detail instead of an abstract takeaway sentence.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if, across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:79, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:393, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:405, no more than one passage still uses repeated-stem anaphora as its dominant rhythm, and across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:277 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:311 the paired-negation construction appears at most once. FAIL if two or more of those cited passages still rely on the same buildup shape.
findings.problem: At multiple emotional peaks the prose falls back on the same sentence-formula builds: repeated stems like "He thought of..." and "He wanted to...", plus paired-negation emphasis such as "Not rage. Not panic." and "Not blank. Not calm." Once, these read as pressure. Repeated across the chapter, they become a visible tic and narrow the rhythm of Micah's interiority.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:79, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:393, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:405, keep only one anaphoric build as a deliberate stress mark and recast the others into different syntactic shapes grounded in action, sensation, or interrupted speech. Also vary either snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:277 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:311 so the paired-negation construction occurs no more than once as a marked effect.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the cited span contains no "almost said" construction and Micah's refusal reads in a distinctly teen voice. Fail if two withheld-speech beats still stack in sequence or if the replacement turns into generic explanation.
findings.problem: The same suppression-template pattern appears again here and doubles within one paragraph. Because it occurs in 7 chapters and stacks twice at 5461, Micah's clinic aftermath feels authored by formula rather than raw, teen-specific thought.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5461 through snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5463 so Micah's resistance to Marcia's "for now" comes through his own rhythm, diction, or action rather than two consecutive "He almost said" sentences. Keep the shame/anger, but vary the syntax and image field toward Micah's faster, rougher register.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into embarrassment, erotic consequence, moral compromise, and the ugly arithmetic of poverty. When a scene turns on prejudice, bureaucracy, violence, or family betrayal, stay with the room long enough for the reader to feel what each choice costs. Resolve edge cases by choosing the more specific and less flattering truth unless it breaks established character logic.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, racism, injury, debt, hunger, or shame is rendered abstractly, rewrite until the bodily detail, social pressure, and changed leverage are visible on the page.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high — contractions are the spoken norm across the novel; uncontracted forms should appear only for emphasis, ceremony, legal language, or character-specific pressure.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and chapter motor across the book: pair public humiliation with private aftermath, follow argument chapters with information-turn or weather chapters, preserve at least three genuinely quiet domestic or communal stretches, and never let more than three chapters in a row hinge on debate followed by decisive action.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary and concrete, with Caribbean-American texture carried naturally in syntax and reference rather than in italicized glossary behavior; lyrical when earned, blunt when the room turns brutal.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person that rotates by chapter; intimate enough for bodily shame and private contradiction, but alert to class performance, racial reading, and room dynamics.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate lean pressure sentences with occasional longer image-bearing sentences; lyric lift should arrive at emotional turns, never as constant prestige haze.
